infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wildr uses your camera to identify animals and insects in the wild.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Wildr to identify creatures from photos in your library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save Wildr photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wildr tags your sightings with where you saw them and shows nearby species.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wildr records nearby animal calls to help identification.

plugins.cameraPermission: Wildr uses your camera to identify animals and insects in the wild.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Wildr to identify creatures from photos in your library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Save Wildr photos to your library.
